raw_text: at first it was good for ordering things and then recently all the payment options were unavailable and the only option that was available is the blinkit wallet so i credited some money into it now i can't place an order with that option also. i can neither order nor get my money back from that blinkit wallet. and especially there is no Customer service to speak with. hate you for this cheap behaviour blinkit !!

today I have placed an order for someone. but the delivery agent didn't confirm and delivered it to someone unknown. He was not even picking up my calls. I was so fed up with the services that how he could deliver to any person without even confirming it. But I am thankful to blinkit that they resolved my issue and delivered a new order to the right person without any charges. thank you blinkit for solving my issue.

Please add "I don't need a bag" feature on the checkout page. I and many others who use the app almost everyday, have countless bags in our house which we don't even know what to use. The competitor flipkart minutes already has the feature which is very useful. Please enable it too in your app 🙏🏻

overall good app, just a small request, when ordering for someone else, it gives them the full billing with price of items, which makes it difficult for you to gift something to someone. i would really request blinkit to edit this feature and share maybe only the tracking details, because we provide the number of that person for communication required for reaching their location and not for giving complete billing

Blinkit is an advertising platform that also do deliveries for the advertised products. Every listing you see in the app is an add. No chance for goods/items that cannot pay advertisement fees to Blinkit. As a buyer i want access to the best products, not just products that have huge financial backings.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Blinkit is an excellent app for quick and hassle-free shopping. The prices are reasonable, and there are many great offers available. The delivery is fast, the products are fresh, and the app is very easy to use. I have had a smooth and reliable experience without any issues. It saves a lot of time, and the customer service is also helpful. I highly recommend Blinkit to anyone looking for a convenient and affordable shopping experience. Keep up the great work!

Blinkit was my go-to app for quick orders. but, I'm having problems since my 3 previous orders. I received spoilt panneer on April 24th, I was told amount will be refunded by 29th April. yet to receive refund. in the next two orders - I ordered the whole truth protein bars - received different flavour which is also priced lesser than the one i ordered for 1 product. customer care could be better, I am not able to reach out to anybody regarding this.

This is the worst app it could be, they over charge you when you go to final order price where 50 rs product becomes 150 rs product with hidden charges and stupid pointless costs like handling cost and small cart charge, why are they taking small cart charge when they launched this app to deliver small items on last minutes, absolute rubbish app ever

The service is at present run by people who loves to turn blind eye towards any issues. The service has become pathetic. If you have any issue then you need to take out time to write mail with image. Once you send image, they will never be able to verify resulting in total waste of your money. It is much better to take out time to buy necessary items from elsewhere. The present management is absolutely Rubbish.

The Only fact that blinkit is superior to other stores is because it's service availability and instant resolution of we explain the issue correctly to the service staff. And I completely agree there might be some problems you might have faced but already we are getting immediate resolution. ;et it be rupee or 10k. keep up the good work BLINKIT.

Very bad experience. I bought two combs, but they are refusing to accept a return. This is disappointing, as other shopping platforms usually provide a hassle-free return process. I won't be purchasing from this platform again.

very Very disappointing experience with this app. The server is extremely poor, and the overall service is pathetic. I ordered a 3D Moon Light but received a very cheap heart-shaped light worth barely ₹50 instead. To make matters worse, I'm unable to use the coupon amount that was issued. The whole process has been frustrating and inconvenient. I've had a much smoother, hassle-free experience with Swiggy, which is far better in comparison. Would not recommend this app to anyone.

Very bad service! There is no way to cancel an order! Once I had ordered an item which was not required by mistake, and when I wanted to cancel it, I couldn't! And most of the time, certain items are not available! This is ridiculous!

Blinkit is fast and convenient, but quality control for third-party sellers, especially gadgets and small appliances, needs improvement. I had inconsistent experiences with two mini coolers due to poor packaging and product quality. Also, some delivery partners in Ahmedabad are rude, asking customers to repeat their name and even list ordered items despite having all order details. Please improve seller standards and delivery professionalism.

Very disappointed. The bread was of poor quality and unusually small in size, and the butter delivered was expired. This is completely unacceptable. I've lost trust in Blinkit's quality checks. I'm uninstalling the app and personally boycotting Blinkit. I won't be ordering from them again.

So far so good. (revised after experiencing for a few more orders). To my surprise, Blinkit delivering to my Home town as well, loved the way the store and the delivery partners handling this model, makes life easier, also they maintain a wide variety of products. Only problem is that customer reviews of the product is not available, it only shows ratings.

They have all kinds of products from electronics,watches to each and every grocery imaginable. Moreover, their delivery partners are super fast. Maximum times, they arrive 5-6 mins earlier. According to my experience,this is a must try online shopping platform.

Blinkit's service is becoming unacceptable. I ordered three cans of Hell energy drink and a packet of chips. The delivery partner reached near my location but refused to come to my doorstep. He told me that if I wanted the order, I had to come and collect it myself; otherwise, he would cancel it. I asked him to deliver it to my location as shown in the app, but he never came. He marked the order as delivered, took the payment, and left without giving me my order. This is completely unacceptable.

I am writing to report that my order is showing as "Delivered" in the app, but I have not received the parcel. I contacted customer support within approximately 2 hours of the delivery status being updated. However, I was informed that complaints can only be registered after 24 hours. This is unreasonable, as customers should be able to report non-delivery immediately. Moreover, the customer care representative was rude, unhelpful, and behaved unprofessionally during the conversation. I request

very disappointed... I have some issues with refund regarding defective product from blinkit .they are not even responding.. I try to find customer care number from Google, they are asking for personal WhatsApp screen share... also tried to raise complaint from blinkit app but they are not responding and blocked the text... can't call. can't text then how can we communicate regarding issue ?
